Hi,

Patch files/patch-extensions_gtkmoz__browser__element_browser__element.cc
fails to apply with 0.10.5. Also the
- --with-gtkmozembed=firefox-gtkmozembed is unknown. I tried this patch to
build google-gadgets
http://people.freebsd.org/~beat/patches/132291-google-gadgets.patch but
this also fails:
http://people.freebsd.org/~beat/logs/132291/google-gadgets-0.10.5.log

Could you please take a look at this problem.

Thanks,
Beat
